title: Coralpowder
description: A mod that adds a gunpowder substitute and adds a variety of coral themed blocks.
body:
A mod for Arcamere that changes out gunpowder with the new coralpowder.

Newly discovered when some pirates found a weirdly explosive powder in shipwrecks close to coral reefs. After reverse engineering they found out that by combining the natural heat and need for combustion of blaze powder, with the sponge like texture of dried out coral. They got a highly explosive compound that was easy to transport and use for explosive weapons.
